scripts.build: yarn build:man && env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}/build" cargo build --release
scripts.build:clean: rm -rf "${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}" && yarn build:man && env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}/build" cargo build --release
scripts.lint: env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS="-W unused -W dead-code" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}/lint" cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings
scripts.typecheck: env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS="-W unused -W dead-code" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}/typecheck" cargo check --quiet --locked
